ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number (e.g., FR6441) */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the flight */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route the flight operates on */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft assigned to the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., on schedule, delayed, canceled) */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal at the departure and arrival airports */,
  "gate" TEXT /* Gate number at the departure and arrival airports */,
  "check_in_counter" TEXT /* Check-in counter number */,
  "baggage_claim" TEXT /* Baggage claim number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin airport of the route */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination airport of the route */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance between the origin and destination airports */,
  "flight_time" TEXT /* Estimated flight time */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the route (e.g., daily, twice weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the schedule belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the schedule */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the schedule */,
  "mon" INTEGER /* Whether the flight operates on Monday */,
  "tue" INTEGER /* Whether the flight operates on Tuesday */,
  "wed" INTEGER /* Whether the flight operates on Wednesday */,
  "thu" INTEGER /* Whether the flight operates on Thursday */,
  "fri" INTEGER /* Whether the flight operates on Friday */,
  "sat" INTEGER /* Whether the flight operates on Saturday */,
  "sun" INTEGER /* Whether the flight operates on Sunday */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the flight within the schedule period (e.g., daily, twice weekly) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the update belongs to */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "status_before" TEXT /* Status of the flight before the update */,
  "status_after" TEXT /* Status of the flight after the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_updates_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff, administrator, passenger) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the flight was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, update, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the aircraft (number of seats) */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the passenger */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "frequent_flyer_number" TEXT /* Frequent flyer number of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the booking is for */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger making the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date of the booking */,
  "booking_time" TEXT /* Time of the booking */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number assigned to the passenger */,
  "fare" TEXT /* Fare paid for the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
